name: boltz-compute-python
description: Codex plugin for Boltz Compute that gives agents six Python SDK-backed workflows for structure prediction, protein and small-molecule screening, de novo protein and small-molecule design, and recovery of job status and downloadable results.

interface.shortDescription: Use the Boltz Compute Python SDK for structure prediction, screening, design, and job recovery workflows.
interface.longDescription: Provides six Codex skills built on the official Boltz Compute Python SDK: structure and binding prediction, small-molecule library screening, small-molecule design, protein library screening, protein binder design, and job-status recovery. Each skill handles asynchronous polling, cost-estimation flow, and local result downloads so agents can run Boltz workflows end to end instead of stitching API calls together manually.
defaultPrompt: Screen this compound library against my target protein and rank the hits.
Design peptide, nanobody, or antibody binders for this target epitope.
Check my Boltz jobs, tell me what finished, and download the results.
